  "analysis": "The code is primarily a standard AFRAME component setup for 3D face meshes, with geometry processing and triangulation using an external Delaunay library. The triangulation and geometry management functions appear legitimate and typical for 3D rendering tasks. There are no signs of malicious behavior such as data exfiltration, network activity, or backdoors. The inclusion of a Delaunay triangulation library is common in mesh generation contexts. The code does not perform any suspicious operations beyond normal 3D geometry processing.",
